curriculum: Indian Education Policy (NEP 2020, CBSE & State Board)

sections.description: Very basic foundation level - recognition, identification, speaking, basic understanding

topics.description: Recognize and identify numbers from 1 to 50
Count objects and match with numbers
Compare sizes - big, small, bigger, smaller
Add two single digit numbers (sum ≤ 10)
Subtract single digit numbers (difference from 0-9)
Identify and recognize basic 2D shapes
Identify and complete simple repeating patterns
Recognize uppercase and lowercase letters
Learn and practice basic letter sounds
micro_concepts: Vowel sounds (a, e, i, o, u)

topics.description: Identify and recognize vowels (A, E, I, O, U)
Learn and recognize simple 3-4 letter words
Match pictures with correct words
Identify and create rhyming word pairs
Read very simple 3-5 word sentences
Understand self-identity - name, age, basic information
learning_objectives: Introduce self with name and age

topics.description: Identify and name body parts
Recognize and understand family relationships
Identify common animals and birds
Identify common fruits and vegetables
Understand three main seasons and their characteristics
Learn and practice daily hygiene habits
Recognize and name basic colors
Learn and sequence the days of the week
Learn names and sequence of 12 months
Recognize and understand the Indian national flag
Identify common transportation vehicles
Identify common birds and their characteristics
Recognize common community places and their functions
Learn gratitude and saying thank you
Learn to apologize and admit mistakes
Learn sharing and cooperation with peers
Learn to help and support friends
Learn respect for parents and elders
Learn cleanliness and environmental responsibility
Learn honesty and truthfulness

sections.description: Intermediate level with increased difficulty - reading, writing, logic, problem solving

topics.description: Recognize, read, and write numbers up to 1000
Add 2-digit and 3-digit numbers with regrouping
Subtract 2-digit and 3-digit numbers with regrouping
Learn multiplication as repeated addition
Learn division as sharing and grouping
Measure and compare lengths and weights
Read analog clock and tell time
Identify and understand nouns in sentences
Identify and understand verbs in sentences
Understand and use simple present tense
Form correct sentences with subject and predicate
Find and match opposite words
Read and comprehend simple paragraphs
Understand articles A, An, and The
Understand basic human body systems
Learn about different types of plants
Learn about different types of animals
Understand water and its importance
Learn about different types of houses
Learn about different modes of transportation
Learn environmental conservation basics
Learn major Indian states and capitals
Understand India's national symbols in detail
Learn about notable Indian leaders
Learn basic facts about solar system
Learn about important Indian festivals
Learn basic facts about popular sports
Learn interesting basic science facts
Identify the item that doesn't belong in a group
Complete missing part of a pattern
Arrange pictures in correct sequence
Match related pairs and objects
Solve simple logic puzzles
Identify and complete number patterns
Identify and complete shape sequences
Develop habit of helping and serving others
Learn respect and appreciation for teachers
Build and maintain healthy friendships
Understand honesty and integrity
Develop self-discipline and following rules
Learn cooperation and working in teams
Develop sense of responsibility towards duties

metadata.curriculum_alignment: Indian Education Policy (NEP 2020, CBSE & State Boards)
